howItWorks.intro: This eye prescription converter calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Vertex Conversion
rules.formula: Contact Power = Glasses Power / (1 - d × Power)
rules.explanation: Adjust for vertex distance between lens and eye.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: Are glasses and contacts prescriptions different?
faq.a: Yes, contacts sit directly on the eye so the power differs, especially for higher prescriptions.

faq.q: Can I use my glasses prescription for contacts?
faq.a: No, you need a separate contact lens fitting and prescription from your eye doctor.
